rationale: Review 2 identifies a real but minor proof-style tightening: the `simp [Set.mem_preimage, eq_comm, map_proj]` in `fiberHomeomorph` could be made more explicit with `simp only`, and this is confirmed against the diff. Acting on it would slightly polish robustness, but it is not a material proof-quality issue a maintainer would clearly require, so approving as in Review 1 leaves an essentially equally good PR.
